name: AnteoTech Limited
summary: AnteoTech Limited engages in developing, commercializing, manufacturing, and distributing products for the life sciences research, vitro diagnostics, energy, and medical device markets primarily in Australia. Its principal technology products include AnteoCoat, which is applicable to the energy sector in lithium-ion batteries; AnteoBind that is applicable to point of care, in vitro, and life science diagnostic sectors. The company also manufactures and sells COVID-19 antigen testing kits. AnteoTech Limited has collaboration agreements with Axxin for for COVID-19 anigen test. The company was formerly known as Anteo Diagnostics Limited and changed its name to AnteoTech Limited in November 2019. AnteoTech Limited was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Eight Mile Plains, Australia.
